title: Republic Services (RSG)Intrinsic Value
description: A transparent, step-by-step discounted cash flow valuation of Republic Services. Using actual financials to arrive at a single fair value estimate for RSG shares.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-luvxz6yh>
A 3.0% perpetual growth rate aligns with long-term GDP growth and inflation, reflecting Republic Services' pricing power and essential nature of its business.
